## FakeActorStateMachine Class

In\-memory test double for [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.IActorStateMachine](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.server.actors.iactorstatemachine 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.IActorStateMachine')\.
Tracks all checkpoint, load, and cleanup calls for test assertions\.
Supports configurable existing pipeline state for resume testing\.

public sealed class FakeActorStateMachine : Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.IActorStateMachine
